---
title: "Violin_Plot"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-16"
---

```{r}
cols = c("MYH11", "PRMT1", "TENT4A", "ZNF585B", "STRN4", "FTX", "ZXDA")

```



```{r}
rna_matrix <- `596_RNAmatrix`
sample sheet
cols = c("MYH11", "PRMT1", "TENT4A", "ZNF585B", "STRN4", "FTX", "ZXDA")
make half violin plot for each Cols ins same plot, left half violin is "Non-metastatis" and half right "metastasis" based on samplesheet$class
```


```{r}

# Install required packages if needed
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("reshape2")
# install.packages("gghalves")

library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(gghalves)

# Your selected genes
cols <- c("MYH11", "PRMT1", "TENT4A", "ZNF585B", "STRN4", "FTX", "ZXDA")

# Combine rna_matrix and class from samplesheet
rna_matrix$class <- samplesheet$class

# Melt the matrix for ggplot
df_long <- melt(rna_matrix, id.vars = "class", measure.vars = cols,
                variable.name = "Gene", value.name = "Expression")

# Plot
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Gene, y = Expression, fill = class)) +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(data = subset(df_long, class == "Non-metastasis"),
                             aes(x = Gene, y = Expression, fill = class),
                             side = "l", alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(data = subset(df_long, class == "Metastasis"),
                             aes(x = Gene, y = Expression, fill = class),
                             side = "r", alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Non-metastasis" = "#1f77b4", "Metastasis" = "#d62728")) +
  labs(title = "Half Violin Plot of Gene Expression by Class",
       x = "Gene", y = "Expression Level") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```
